summary: 2026-07-02 19:38:17 PDT — Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/rate-input-sync.md`. The branch matches the spec: draft sync is scoped to unfocused `NumberInput`s, focused drafts are preserved, the helper is pure and tested, `min="0"` is present on the specified inputs, and changed files stay within AC4. I attempted the focused client test, but the read-only sandbox blocked Vite's temp-file write with `EPERM`; `git diff --check main...HEAD` passed.
